scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && pnpm build:main && ARGENT_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist/main.js"
scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter @argent/core build && pnpm --filter @argent/connectors build && pnpm --filter @argent/mcp build && pnpm --filter @argent/plaid build && pnpm --filter @argent/cli build && pnpm build && electron dist/smoke.js
